---
title: "Generating weights"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
.libPaths("/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/")
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(scClassify)
  library(caret) 
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
})
```

```{r}
load(".RData")
```

```{r eval = F}
# extract log-normalised expression matrix and existing cell type labels
exprMat = assay(speSub, "scaledata") |> as ("dgCMatrix")
labels  = speSub$cellType

# train
model = train_scClassify(exprsMat_train = exprMat,
                         cellTypes_train = labels, 
                         tree = "HOPACH",
                         selectFeatures = "limma",
                         parallel = TRUE,
                         verbose = TRUE,
                         BPPARAM = BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 20))
```

```{r eval = F}
# extract the wkNN scores (both weights assigned to each cell and the correlation)
# we get 10 weights/correlation values for each cell (k = 10)

devtools::load_all("../scClassifyWeights/")

cellIdx = split(seq_len(ncol(speSub)), cut(seq_len(ncol(speSub)), breaks = 5))
names(cellIdx) = paste0("fold", seq_along(cellIdx))

levelModel = model$hierarchyKNNRes[["limma"]]$model
levelHVG   = model$hierarchyKNNRes[["limma"]]$hvg

chunkSize = 1000
weightResults = list()

for (foldName in names(cellIdx)) {
  
  cat("Processing", foldName, "\n")
  exprMatTest = assay(speSub[, cellIdx[[foldName]]], "logcounts") |> as("dgCMatrix")
  weightResults[[foldName]] = list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(levelModel)) {
    if (is.null(levelModel[[i]])) next
    
    for (j in seq_along(levelModel[[i]])) {
      
      # skip noModel branches
      if ("character" %in% is(levelModel[[i]][[j]])) next
      
      cat("  level", i, "branch", j, "\n")
      
      # find common genes
      commonHVG  = intersect(rownames(exprMatTest), levelHVG[[i]][[j]])
      exprMatSub = exprMatTest[commonHVG, , drop = FALSE]
      exprMatSub = exprMatSub[Matrix::rowSums(exprMatSub) != 0, , drop = FALSE]
      
      if (nrow(exprMatSub) < 5) next
      
      commonGenes = intersect(rownames(exprMatSub), colnames(levelModel[[i]][[j]]$train))
      exprMatSub  = exprMatSub[commonGenes, , drop = FALSE]
      trainMat    = Matrix::t(levelModel[[i]][[j]]$train[, commonGenes])
      
      # chunk test cells to avoid memory issues
      nCells = ncol(exprMatSub)
      chunks = split(seq_len(nCells), ceiling(seq_len(nCells) / chunkSize))
      
      wknnResList = lapply(chunks, function(idx) {
        
        corMat = calculateSimilarity(
          exprsMat_train = trainMat,
          exprsMat_test  = exprMatSub[, idx, drop = FALSE],
          similarity = "pearson")
        
        WKNNcor(corMat = corMat,
          subLevelModel = levelModel[[i]][[j]],
          cutoff_method = "dynamic",
          k = 10,
          prob_threshold = 0.7,
          cor_threshold_static = 0.5,
          cor_threshold_high = 0.7,
          topLevel = FALSE,
          verbose = FALSE)})
      
      # combine chunks
      weightResults[[foldName]][[paste0("level", i, "_branch", j)]] = list(
        predRes = do.call(c, lapply(wknnResList, `[[`, "predRes")),
        topKNN = do.call(cbind, lapply(wknnResList, `[[`, "topKNN")),
        topKNN_cor = do.call(cbind, lapply(wknnResList, `[[`, "topKNN_cor")),
        topKNN_weight = do.call(cbind, lapply(wknnResList, `[[`, "topKNN_weight")),
        level = i,
        branch = j
      )
    }
  }
}

names(weightResults) = c(paste0("fold", 1:5))
```

```{r}
# obtain vote margin
# vote margin = group test cell neighbours by class, sum the weights within each class
# divide weight of each class by total weight to get vote margin
# high confidence cell would have scores close to 1/0 (all neighbours of the same class)
# low confidence cells would have scores that are all around the middle (0.4/0.5) (neighbours of mixed class)

getVoteMargin = function(topKNN_weight, topKNN) {
  # for each cell (column), compute the vote margin
  vapply(seq_len(ncol(topKNN_weight)), function(i) {
    
    weights = topKNN_weight[, i]
    labels  = topKNN[, i]
    
    # aggregate weights by cell type label
    vote = stats::aggregate(weights, by = list(label = labels), sum)
    
    # remove unassigned votes (-1)
    vote = vote[vote$label != "-1", ]
    
    if (nrow(vote) == 0) return(0)  # all neighbours were unassigned
    
    # winning class proportion of total weight
    max(vote$x / sum(vote$x))
    
  }, numeric(1L))
}

# extract vote margins 
confidenceDf = list()

for (foldName in names(weightResults)) {
  for (branchName in names(weightResults[[foldName]])) {
    
    res = weightResults[[foldName]][[branchName]]
    
    voteMargin = getVoteMargin(res$topKNN_weight, res$topKNN)
    
    confidenceDf[[paste0(foldName, "_", branchName)]] = data.frame(
      cellID = names(res$predRes),
      fold = foldName,
      branch = branchName,
      level  = res$level,
      predRes = res$predRes,
      voteMargin = voteMargin
    )
  }
}

confidenceDf = do.call(rbind, confidenceDf)
rownames(confidenceDf) = NULL

# fix the cellID column - strip the leading "1." or any "digits." prefix
confidenceDf$cellID = gsub("^[0-9]+\\.", "", confidenceDf$cellID)

head(confidenceDf)
```

```{r}
# obtain final vote margins (this is the leaf score)
finalConfidence = confidenceDf |>
  dplyr::group_by(cellID) |>
  dplyr::summarise(finalLabel = predRes[which.max(level)],
    nLevels = dplyr::n(),
    confidenceScore = voteMargin[which.max(level)])
```

```{r eval = F}
# obtain predicted cell type labels
# predict using the trained model
nFolds = 5
cellIdx = split(seq_len(ncol(speSub)), cut(seq_len(ncol(speSub)), breaks = nFolds))
names(cellIdx) = paste0("fold", seq_along(cellIdx))

predResults = lapply(cellIdx, function(idx) {
  exprMatTest = assay(speSub[, idx], "logcounts") |> as("dgCMatrix")
  
  pred = predict_scClassify(exprsMat_test = exprMatTest,
                            trainRes = model,
                            algorithm = "WKNN",
                            similarity = "pearson",
                            cutoff_method = "dynamic",
                            parallel = TRUE,
                            BPPARAM = BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 5),
                            verbose = TRUE)
  return(pred)
})
names(predResults) = paste0("fold", seq_along(predResults))

# extract predicted labels across all folds
predLabelsDf = do.call(rbind, lapply(names(predResults), function(foldName) {
  data.frame(
    cellID = names(predResults[[foldName]]$pearson_WKNN_limma$predRes),
    cellType = predResults[[foldName]]$pearson_WKNN_limma$predRes,
    fold = foldName)})) 

rownames(predLabelsDf) = NULL

# join to finalConfidence
finalConfidence = finalConfidence |>
  dplyr::left_join(predLabelsDf, by = c("cellID"))
```

```{r}
cDat = colData(speSub) |> as.data.frame()
cDat = merge(cDat, finalConfidence |> dplyr::select(cellID, confidenceScore, cellType), by = "cellID")

# rename columns
cDat = cDat |> dplyr::rename(c("cellType" = "cellType.x", "predLabels" = "cellType.y"))
colData(speSub) = cDat |> DataFrame()
```

```{r}
hist(finalConfidence$confidenceScore, main = "Histogram of confidence scores", xlab = "Confidence scores")
```
